title: Shear Item Frames
description: This mod allows you to shear (and wax) item frames!
body:
This mod allows you to shear (and wax) item frames!

Shearing an item frame makes it invisible, only showing the item which allows for some cool decoration.

![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eee3760c965f8ad16998ca6080fab8f28a0df40b.png)
![Decoration example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d832fb56a2b4430200e23f96ecac90989a7538b.png)

Waxing the item frame stops players from rotating it. Good in places where you don't want to rotate it accidentally.

![Wax on!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abf2bf7e57f5bea93b34fc2e3e446d01acf78943.png)
